info.title: Northpass API
info.description: Northpass is a learning platform that allows you to build powerful learning applications. The API provides access to manage courses, people, groups, assignments, learning paths, properties, webhooks, and more.

get.summary: List unassociated groups for a course
List unenrolled people for a course

post.summary: Enable course retake for a person
Enroll a person in a course

delete.summary: Remove a person from a course
Remove a person from a group

get.summary: List unassociated groups for a learning path
List unenrolled people for a learning path

post.summary: Add courses to groups in bulk
Add learning paths to groups in bulk
Invite people to school in bulk
Add people to groups in bulk
Enroll people in courses in bulk
Enroll people in learning paths in bulk

get.summary: List unique values for a property definition

ApiKeyAuth.name: Authorization
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key for authentication. Admin users required for certain operations.
